mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT ( PRODUCT_NO, SALLER_NO, CATEGORY_NO, PRODUCT_TITLE, PRODUCT_CONTENT, PRODUCT_CONDITION, PRICE, LOCATION, STATUS, ADMIN_HIDE_YN ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCT.NEXTVAL, #{sallerNo}, #{categoryNo}, #{productTitle}, #{productContent}, #{productCondition}, #{price}, #{location}, '01', 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET PRODUCT_TITLE = #{productTitle}, PRODUCT_CONTENT = #{productContent}, PRODUCT_CONDITION = #{productCondition}, PRICE = #{price}, LOCATION = #{location}, STATUS = #{status}, MODIFY_DT = SYSDATE WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} AND SALLER_NO = #{sallerNo}
mapper.select: SELECT PRODUCT_NO, SALLER_NO, CATEGORY_NO, PRODUCT_TITLE, PRODUCT_CONTENT, PRODUCT_CONDITION, PRICE, LOCATION, STATUS, ADMIN_HIDE_YN, HIDE_REASON, VIEW_COUNT, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as createDt, TO_CHAR(MODIFY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as modifyDt, LIKE_CNT, CHAT_CNT FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}

SELECT PRODUCT_NO as productNo, SALLER_NO as sallerNo, CATEGORY_NO as categoryNo, PRODUCT_TITLE as productTitle, PRODUCT_CONTENT as productContent, PRODUCT_CONDITION as productCondition, PRICE as price, LOCATION as location, STATUS as status, ADMIN_HIDE_YN as adminHideYn, HIDE_REASON as hideReason, VIEW_COUNT as viewCount, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createDt, LIKE_CNT as likeCnt, CHAT_CNT as chatCnt FROM PRODUCT WHERE ADMIN_HIDE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET chat_cnt = chat_cnt - 1 WHERE product_no = #{productNo} AND chat_cnt > 0
